rows.description: May 14 Pᵈ Share of Benson Fine
rows.notes: Values and description selected from gemini-flash. Visual inspection confirms 1 pound, 16 shillings, 6 and three-quarter pence. gpt-5-mini incorrectly read shillings as 6 and pence as 9, and missed the date in the description.
rows.english_description: Payment to Benson as his share of a fine.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Benson as his share of a fine, amounting to £1 16s 6¾d.

rows.description: Pᵈ Do of Taylor of Jew's Fine

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Taylor as his share of the Jew's fine, amounting to £1 11s 3½d.

rows.description: Janu 23 Magʳ Tonkin pro Decrem. ad Test. Nat. 1768

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Tonkin for a decree relating to a testament, amounting to £8 9s 9¾d.
